flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Mayland Community College fell 70% between 2006 and 2009 (100.0% → 29.8%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 30% at Mayland Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (371 vs 532).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Mayland Community College fell 16% between 2021 and 2024 (433 → 362).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mayland Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.8% → 0.0%).
